SEARCH
Module com.example.progettosw
Package model.deck

Class Decktemplates

java.lang.Object
model.deck.Decktemplates
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Decktemplates extends Object implements Serializable
This is a static class that for each deck has a static method that returns the List of all model.cards that need to be in that deck
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Decktemplates()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static LinkedList<CardGold>
    GoldCardDeck()
    This method creates a deck of gold cards ( id from 41 to 80)
    static LinkedList<CardObjective>
    ObjectiveCardDeck()
    This method creates a deck of objective cards (id from 87 to 102)
    static LinkedList<CardResource>
    ResourceCardDeck()
    This method creates a deck of resource cards (id from 1 to 40) In order: suit of the card, the four corners (starting from upright) and the points
    static LinkedList<CardStarting>
    StartingCardDeck()
    This method creates a deck of starting cards (id from 81 to 86)

      This method creates a deck of resource cards (id from 1 to 40) In order: suit of the card, the four corners (starting from upright) and the points
